fields.validation_status: Standalone context-stack integration is committed at 4ededdc3. The mounted crates/context-stack worktree now points at 4ededdc3 locally, Cargo.toml and context-editor VS Code task/launch paths in context-engine now target crates/context-stack/tools/**, cargo check -p context-cli -p context-mcp -p context-http -p context-editor-kernel -p sandbox-app passes from the root workspace, and only intentional migration docs/tests still mention the old tools/** paths. Physical source-tree cleanup remains tracked separately.
